# Local Liber Primus Discord HTML Archive

This directory is for local admin-provided Discord HTML exports.

Raw chat logs are intentionally ignored. Do not commit raw logs, message bodies, usernames, user IDs, avatars, private attachment URLs, or generated local review indexes.

Use the Stage 3N Discord ingestion CLI to generate local ignored indexes and aggregate summaries. The public repository should only contain schemas, code, documentation, tests, and aggregate/redacted summaries.
